nav.skinQuizDesc: Find your ideal routine in 2 minutes

home.skinQuizDesc: Find your perfect routine in 60 seconds
home.conflictCheckerDesc: Check if your ingredients play well together
home.quizCtaDesc: Quick questions about your skin type, concerns, and goals. Your personalized routine in 60 seconds.
home.aboutDesc: We write about skincare because we're genuinely obsessed with it. Everything here has been tested on our own skin. No sponsored posts, no paid placements.
home.slideSkincareDesc: Ingredient breakdowns, routine guides, and reviews from people who test what they write about.
home.slideVanityDesc: Fewer products, better results. We tested hundreds so you don't have to.
home.slideIngredientsDesc: Beyond the marketing claims. What the research says about your favorite actives.

footer.brandDesc: We test everything before we write about it. If it didn't work on our skin, it's not on this site.
footer.newsletterDesc: Weekly skincare breakdowns & honest reviews. No spam, just glow.

newsletter.title: Get the Glow
newsletter.description: New reviews, ingredient breakdowns, and routine tips every week. No fluff.

categoryDescriptions.skincare: Routines, skin type guides, and the fundamentals of building a skincare routine that works.
categoryDescriptions.ingredients: Deep-dives into active ingredients. what they do, who they're for, and how to use them.
categoryDescriptions.reviews: Honest product reviews and multi-product roundups. tested on real skin, not press releases.
categoryDescriptions.howTos: Step-by-step tutorials, seasonal routines, and fixes for common skincare mistakes.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.heading: Page Not Found
notFound.message: This page seems to have disappeared from our routine. Let's get you back on track with some great reads.
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist. Browse our latest articles on Korean skincare, beauty ingredients, and product reviews.

ingredientChecker.title: Ingredient Conflict Checker
ingredientChecker.description: Select the ingredients in your routine and we'll check for conflicts, cautions, and great pairings.
ingredientChecker.noInteractions: No known interactions between these ingredients. They should be safe to use together.
ingredientChecker.glossaryDesc: Browse all ingredients and what they do

ingredientGlossary.title: Ingredient Glossary
ingredientGlossary.description: Search and filter skincare ingredients. Learn what they do, which skin types benefit, and what products contain them.

quiz.title: AI Skin Analysis
quiz.description: Upload a selfie or answer a few questions to get your personalized skincare routine and product recommendations.
quiz.poweredByAi: Powered by AI. Your data stays private and is never shared.
